title: Exploring combat personhood books — hand-to-hand and weaponized
motto: Two books for the embodied person — not vehicles. Full understanding of martial arts and personal weapons.
disclaimer: Educational martial arts and weapons doctrine only — not instructions to harm. Lawful where permitted; de-escalation and retreat when possible.

books.title: Exploring Hand-to-Hand Combat
books.scope: Embodied person — unarmed and grappling arts, all martial families, BJJ training lattice

books.title: Exploring Weaponized Combat
books.scope: Embodied person — firearms, knives, edged and impact weapons, less-lethal recognition

combat_anatomy.statement: Per-area mechanical & biological depth — hand, wrist, elbow, shoulder, spine, core, hip, knee, ankle, neck/head.
